title: Wiki Skill Workflows Implementation Plan
description: wiki-ingest, wiki-update, wiki-query workflow와 publish-draft/health CLI facade를 구현하기 위한 Stenc 실행 계획.

page.humanSummary: 다음 구현은 사람이 세 요청만 기억하도록 skill/workflow와 CLI facade를 추가한다.
page.agentSummary: Implement repo-local wiki-ingest/wiki-update/wiki-query skill docs, CLI publish-draft and health facade commands, MCP parity, docs alignment, and tests while preserving deterministic validation boundaries.

body.goal: LLM Wiki의 권장 사용 모델을 실제 repo-local skill/workflow 문서, CLI facade, MCP wrapper, usage/architecture 문서, 테스트로 구현한다.
body.architecture: Repo-local skills encode semantic workflows and produce drafts or reports. tools/wiki CLI owns durable mutation and validation. MCP exposes the same CLI-backed facade for agents.

workerInstructions.note: 각 slice는 fail-first 테스트 또는 문서 검증 기준을 먼저 세우고, 구현 후 전체 검증을 실행한다.

scopeCheck.assessment: 단일 workflow facade 작업이다. 실제 LLM 모델 호출이나 OCR/parser engine은 포함하지 않는다.
scopeCheck.decomposition: CLI facade, MCP parity, repo-local skill docs, human docs alignment, final verification 순서로 나눈다.

body.currentState: 현재 tools/wiki에는 ingest-source, apply-draft, publish-draft, health, lint, hash-source, validate-page가 있고, usage.md, architecture.md, LLM-WIKI.md에는 wiki-ingest/wiki-update/wiki-query가 권장 workflow 이름으로 문서화되어 있다. repo-local skill files와 MCP parity도 구현되어 있으며, 남은 작업은 Stenc/final verification으로 수렴한다.
body.targetState: 사용자는 wiki-ingest, wiki-update, wiki-query 세 workflow를 사용하고, 내부 durable 변경은 publish-draft 또는 health를 포함한 CLI/MCP 품질 경로를 통과한다.

in: tests/test_wiki_tools.py coverage for new commands and MCP tools

fileStructure.responsibility: Add publish-draft and health command routing.
Expose reusable publish behavior if CLI needs a shared dry-run/apply helper.
Expose wiki_publish_draft and wiki_health tools backed by CLI/lib behavior.
Document source-to-wiki ingest workflow for agents.
Document safe existing-page update workflow for agents.
Document query modes and capture behavior for agents.
Point agents to repo-local skill workflows and publish-draft.
Copy usage, architecture, Stenc source, and repo-local skill workflow files into new vaults.
Add tests for CLI facade commands and MCP parity.
Make simplified workflow the primary human usage path.

slices.title: CLI facade commands

files.role: Add fail-first tests for health and publish-draft.
Add shared publish helper only if needed to avoid duplicate CLI logic.

steps.title: Write health CLI tests
steps.instruction: Add tests proving `python3 tools/wiki/cli.py health` always runs lint, writes scratch/reports/YYYY-MM-DD-lint.md, exits with the same status as lint, and exits 0 on the current vault.

steps.title: Implement health command
steps.instruction: Implement health as a human-friendly alias for lint with the default dated report path. Keep output concise and do not mutate wiki pages.

steps.title: Write publish-draft sequencing tests
steps.instruction: Add tests proving publish-draft performs clean pre-lint and dry-run validation before applying, stops on validation failure, applies valid drafts, writes a report, runs lint afterward, and rolls back page/index/log changes when post-apply lint fails.

steps.title: Implement publish-draft command
steps.instruction: Implement `publish-draft <path> --report` as clean pre-lint, dry-run apply_draft, real apply_draft, post-lint/report, and rollback on post-apply lint failure. Reuse existing functions instead of shelling out where possible.

steps.title: Verify CLI facade
steps.instruction: Run focused and full tests.

doneWhen: publish-draft stops before mutation on invalid draft.
publish-draft applies valid draft, runs lint, and rolls back page/index/log changes on post-apply lint failure.

slices.title: MCP parity

files.role: Add MCP list/call tests for wiki_health and wiki_publish_draft.
Expose new tools without duplicating business logic.

steps.title: Add MCP tool listing tests
steps.instruction: Extend existing MCP tests to expect wiki_health and wiki_publish_draft in the tool list.
steps.expected: FAIL until MCP tool list is updated.

steps.title: Implement MCP tool list and call handlers
steps.instruction: Route wiki_health and wiki_publish_draft to the same library behavior used by CLI. Do not introduce separate validation semantics.

steps.title: Verify MCP parity
steps.instruction: Run MCP-focused tests and full tooling tests.

doneWhen: MCP behavior matches CLI validation/report semantics.
No duplicated business logic is introduced.

slices.title: Repo-local skill workflow docs

files.role: Agent instructions for new source reflection.
Agent instructions for safe page updates.
Agent instructions for answer-only, answer-with-report, and answer-and-capture.
Add lightweight checks that required skill docs exist and mention CLI boundary.

steps.title: Write skill-doc presence tests
steps.instruction: Add tests that require wiki-ingest, wiki-update, and wiki-query skill docs to exist and include the cognition/mutation boundary.

steps.title: Create wiki-ingest skill
steps.instruction: Write SKILL.md for source ingestion workflow. Include source registration, duplicate check, draft creation, publish-draft, lint, and result reporting.

steps.title: Create wiki-update skill
steps.instruction: Write SKILL.md for existing page updates. Include human-lock handling, contradiction handling, draft generation, and publish flow.

steps.title: Create wiki-query skill
steps.instruction: Write SKILL.md for query mode selection. Include answer-only, answer-with-report, answer-and-capture, and when to write reports or drafts.

steps.title: Verify skill docs
steps.instruction: Run baseline tests.

doneWhen: Skill docs forbid bypassing CLI validation for durable writes.

slices.title: Human and architecture docs alignment

files.role: Keep simple three-workflow usage as the primary path and move low-level commands to advanced/reference sections if needed.
Explain skill, CLI, MCP, Git responsibility boundaries.
Record final skill workflow architecture as canonical direction.
Point readers to simplified usage and architecture docs.

steps.title: Update usage guide
steps.instruction: Ensure docs/usage.md presents wiki-ingest, wiki-update, wiki-query before low-level CLI details and states that publish-draft/health are facade commands once implemented.

steps.title: Update architecture guide
steps.instruction: Add a section explaining that skills handle cognition, CLI handles mutation/validation, MCP wraps CLI semantics, and Git stores durable state.

steps.title: Update canonical architecture note
steps.instruction: Update docs/LLM-WIKI.md to include the final skill names and query modes.

steps.title: Verify docs
steps.instruction: Run wiki lint and diff check.
steps.command: python3 tools/wiki/cli.py lint --report scratch/reports/2026-05-29-lint.md && git diff --check

doneWhen: Human docs describe publish-draft and health as implemented facade commands after tests prove availability.

files.role: Mark slices done as they land.

steps.title: Validate Stenc JSON
steps.instruction: Run Stenc validation for the spec and plan JSON files.

steps.title: Regenerate rendered docs
steps.instruction: Regenerate Stenc static pages from JSON sources.
steps.expected: Rendered pages are regenerated under docs/stenc.

steps.title: Check rendered pages
steps.instruction: Confirm every Stenc JSON source has a rendered page.

steps.title: Run final repo verification
steps.instruction: Run all wiki tooling tests and lint.
steps.command: python3 -m unittest tests/test_wiki_quality_baseline.py tests/test_wiki_tools.py && python3 tools/wiki/cli.py lint --report scratch/reports/2026-05-29-lint.md && git diff --check

risks.mitigation: publish-draft must stop on dry-run failure, return non-zero without applying, and rollback page/index/log changes when post-apply lint fails.

risks.risk: Skill docs imply agent can mutate wiki directly.
risks.mitigation: Baseline tests and docs require the cognition/mutation boundary to be stated explicitly.

risks.risk: MCP behavior diverges from CLI behavior.
risks.mitigation: Route MCP tools to shared functions or CLI-equivalent handlers and test parity.

risks.risk: Usage docs advertise commands before implementation.
risks.mitigation: After implementation, keep docs and baseline tests aligned so facade commands are described as available only when tests prove availability.

validation.purpose: Confirm rendered pages exist for Stenc JSON sources.
Confirm implementation behavior and baseline docs.

agentInstructions: Follow slices in executionOrder unless new evidence invalidates the plan.
Use superpowers:test-driven-development for CLI and MCP changes.
Use superpowers:verification-before-completion before claiming any slice complete.
Do not implement automatic LLM model invocation in this plan.

selfReviewChecks.name: Spec coverage
selfReviewChecks.purpose: Confirm every spec requirement maps to at least one slice.

selfReviewChecks.name: No placeholders
selfReviewChecks.purpose: Confirm no TBD or vague step remains.

selfReviewChecks.name: Implementation safety
selfReviewChecks.purpose: Confirm publish-draft cannot apply invalid drafts.

options.label: Subagent-Driven
options.description: Dispatch a fresh subagent per slice and review between slices.

options.label: Inline Execution
options.description: Execute slices in this session with checkpointed verification.

supportingSections.heading: Agentic Worker Header
supportingSections.content: For agentic workers: REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox syntax for tracking.
items: Use TDD for CLI and MCP behavior.
Keep skill docs declarative and operational.
Run Stenc validation after changing this plan.

links.label: Spec
links.purpose: Canonical behavior contract that this implementation plan executes.
